In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], during the [[Bacta War]], [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] '''ambushed''' a [[Xucphra Corporation]] [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] convoy under [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Ait Convarion]] in a [[Unidentified star system (red dwarf)|star system]] with a [[Red dwarf/Legends|red dwarf]] and a dust disk.

==Background==
After the hijacking of several [[Xucphra Corporation]] [[Bacta Tanker]]s by [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferran]] [[Minister of Trade]] [[Fliry Vorru]] suggested, and Xucphra [[Chief Operating Officer]] [[Ysanne Isard]] agreed, to suspend direct shipment of [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] and to implement a convoy system under which the Bacta Tankers would be escorted to centralized locations to by collected by client worlds. To avoid the difficult task of striking against the escorted convoys, Rogue Squadron's [[Zaltin Corporation|Zaltin]] allies initiated an operation separate the tankers from their escort. The [[Ashern]] sliced new code into the [[Navigation computer/Legends|navicomputers]] of three Bacta Tankers which were part of a small convoy escorted by the [[Victory II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter/Legends|''Corrupter'']]. The sliced codes produced a course deviation in the final leg of their trip to the [[Rishi system/Legends|Rish system]] and the three ships were met by Rogue Squadron in a [[Unidentified star system (red dwarf)|star system]].<ref name="Bacta War" />

==The battle==
Although [[Rogue Leader/Legends|Rogue Leader]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] convinced the [[Captain/Legends|captains]] of the Bacta Tankers ''[[Xucphra Meander]]'' and ''[[Xucphra Rose]]'' to surrender, the third tanker, the ''[[Xucphra Alazhi]]'' resisted and tried to stop the ''Meander''{{'s}} defection. Antilles ordered Rogue Squadron [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] [[Gavin Darklighter]] and [[Riv Shiel]] to disarm the ship, and after losing its [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] armament, the ''Xucphra Alazhi'' surrendered. Meanwhile, while waiting at the previous transit point, the ''Corrupter'' had tracked the exit vectors of all the ships in his convoy. The discovery that three ships had deviated from the planned course prompted [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Ait Convarion]] to follow them.<ref name="Bacta War" />

The ''Corrupter''{{'s}} entry vector into the system was the same as that of the three tankers, and the exit vector of the ''Xucphra Alazhi'' as it prepared to jump to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. When the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] reverted to realspace, it immediately opened fire, destroying the tanker, two of the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Chir'daki]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] and one [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]], killing Shiel and forcing Darklighter to jump blindly out of the system. Having completed their mission, the surviving X-wing and Chir'daki starfighters jumped to hyperspace.<ref name="Bacta War" />
